response.justification: Candidate is a skilled full-stack software craftsman with ~13-16 years of experience and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP, agentic workflows) at Naver. However, the role is a Director-level IC (Principal Engineer) focused on AI strategy, requiring recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products/platforms, and cloud/AI thought leadership at scale. The resume shows no deep AI/ML background, no advanced degree in AI, no evidence of advising strategic customers at executive level, and no track record of shaping cloud/AI product strategy. Experience is solid but oriented toward senior IC product work, not principal-level AI strategy.
strengths: Broad full-stack experience across web, mobile, desktop, embedded systems
Recent hands-on work with AI agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at Naver
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, testing, open-source contributions, public talks
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML expertise or recognized AI products/platforms built
No advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in AI-related field
Lacks principal/director-level strategic scope — no evidence of advising strategic customers or shaping cloud/AI roadmaps

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise and AI products
Insufficient seniority/strategic scope for Director-level IC
Recent AI-agent infrastructure exposure at Naver
